title: ResearchRunRequested
description: Published by the gateway when a user starts a research run. Consumed by the mesh (M2) and later routed through the engine (M4). Exchange: `consilience` (topic), routing key: `run.requested`.

runId.description: The runs.id row created by the gateway before publishing

userId.description: Internal users.id (never the raw Clerk id) — consumers scope all writes by it
